name: ALBANY INTERNATIONAL CORP /DE/
summary: PART I General Founded in 1895, Albany International Corp. is a global leader in advanced textiles and materials processing specializing in designing and manufacturing high-performance engineered fabrics and composite components and assemblies that serve industries such as paper, industrial manufacturing, and aerospace.
